zh.lifeSummary: 當Sara Jacob Kolfs於1663年7月1日出生在美國紐約州紐約市布盧可林布申維其可時，她的父親Jacobus Kolfs37歲，母親Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack25歲。她於1680年3月14日與Pieter Jan Losee在美國紐約州金斯福拉特布申結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1722年在美國紐約州金斯福拉特布申享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sara Jacob Kolfs于1663年7月1日出生在美国纽约州紐約市布盧可林布申維其可时，她的父亲Jacobus Kolfs37岁，母亲Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack25岁。她于1680年3月14日与Pieter Jan Losee在美国纽约州金斯福拉特布申结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1722年在美国纽约州金斯福拉特布申享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kolfs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Czech (Koliš): from a pet form of the personal name Mikoláš, from Greek Nikolaos (see Nicholas ), or a nickname for a very large man, from an altered form of the Biblical personal name Goliáš ‘Goliath’. Compare Golias .

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

nameMeanings.name: Sara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

variants.name: Sarah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1683: Kings, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Kings, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Sara Jacob Kolfs was born on 1 July 1663, in Bushwick, Brooklyn, New York City, New York, United States, her father, Jacobus Kolfs, was 37 and her mother, Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack, was 25. She married Pieter Jan Losee on 14 March 1680, in Flatbush, Kings, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1722, in Flatbush, Kings, New York, United States, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sara Jacob Kolfs est née le 1 juillet 1663, à Bushwick, Brooklyn, New York City, New York, États-Unis, son père, Jacobus Kolfs, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Pieter Jan Losee le 14 mars 1680, à Flatbush, Kings, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1722, à Flatbush, Kings, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sara Jacob Kolfs am 1. Juli 1663 in Bushwick, Brooklyn, New York City, New York, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacobus Kolfs 37 und ihre Mutter Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack 25. Sie hat am 14. März 1680 in Flatbush, Kings, New York, Vereinigte Staaten Pieter Jan Losee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1722 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Flatbush, Kings, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sara Jacob Kolfs è nata il il 1 luglio 1663 nel Bushwick, Brooklyn, New York City, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Jacobus Kolfs, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Pieter Jan Losee il 14 marzo 1680, nel Flatbush, Kings, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1722, nel Flatbush, Kings, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sara Jacob Kolfsが1663年7月1日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州ニュー ヨーク シトイブルークリンブシュウィックで生まれた時，父Jacobus Kolfsは37歳，母Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroackは25歳であった。1680年3月14日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州キングズフラトブッシュでPieter Jan Loseeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1722年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州キングズフラトブッシュで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sara Jacob Kolfs(이)가 1663년 7월 1일 미국 뉴욕 주 뉴 요르크 시티 브루클린 부스h윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacobus Kolfs(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1680년 3월 14일 미국 뉴욕 주 킨그스 플라트부시에서 Pieter Jan Losee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1722년 미국 뉴욕 주 킨그스 플라트부시에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sara Jacob Kolfs nasceu em 1 de julho de 1663, em Bushwick, Brooklyn, New York City, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jacobus Kolfs, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Pieter Jan Losee em 14 de março de 1680, em Flatbush, Kings, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1722, em Flatbush, Kings, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sara Jacob Kolfs родилась 1 июля 1663 г. в местности бушвикк, бруклин, Нью-Йорк, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Jacobus Kolfs было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pieter Jan Losee 14 марта 1680 г. в местности флатбуш, кингс, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1722 г. в местности флатбуш, кингс, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sara Jacob Kolfs nació el 1 de julio de 1663, en Bushwick, Brooklyn, Nueva York, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jacobus Kolfs, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Sarah Pietersdochter Hasenbroack, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Pieter Jan Losee el 14 de marzo de 1680, en Flatbush, Kings, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1722, en Flatbush, Kings, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 59 años.
